content: مَفرَشُ اِلتَرَبيزَةِ لاَزِمَ يَتَغَيَّرُ عَلَشانَ مِش نَظيفٌ
translations: eng:the table cloth needs to be changed because it is not clean

transcriptions.arabizi: mafrash iltarabeeza laezim yitghayar Aalashaen mish nazeef
